title: Customers Without Orders
description: Find customers who never placed an order.
constraints: id is the primary key of Customers
id is the primary key of Orders
customerId in Orders is a foreign key referencing Customers.id
key_concept: NOT IN subquery OR LEFT JOIN + IS NULL. Anti-join pattern.

hints.L1: Find customers whose ID doesn't appear in the Orders table.
hints.L2: Option 1: SELECT name FROM Customers WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT customerId FROM Orders). Option 2: LEFT JOIN and filter NULL.
hints.L3: SELECT c.name AS Customers FROM Customers c LEFT JOIN Orders o ON c.id = o.customerId WHERE o.customerId IS NULL

optimal_solution:
SELECT c.name AS Customers
FROM Customers c
LEFT JOIN Orders o ON c.id = o.customerId
WHERE o.customerId IS NULL;
